text:
https://github.com/pcbsd/pcbsd/commit/9dc6aa26de2508b50dec6054edeee2d67998ad73 (2015-11-16)

>  When we boot PC-BSD desktop, check for new wireless devices which are missing /etc/rc.conf wlans_<device> entries.
> 
> This fixes a problem where the GUI tools don't see any wireless devices
anymore on -CURRENT
